zh.title: 大学生锦标赛赛场留念
zh.achievement: 第27届中国大学生羽毛球锦标赛
zh.summary: 团队在全国大学生羽毛球赛场合影，记录从训练、参赛到赛后复盘的完整成长经历。

zh.title: 奖杯、奖牌与成绩证书
zh.summary: 把一次次参赛结果沉淀为可追踪的成长档案，让努力被看见，也让下一阶段目标更清晰。

zh.title: 青少年学员领奖时刻
zh.summary: 从日常训练到站上领奖台，记录技术、心态和比赛经验一起成长的瞬间。

zh.title: 青少年组冠军领奖
zh.summary: 领奖台上的结果来自长期训练中的每一次纠错、坚持和赛后复盘。

zh.title: 青少年组多人获奖
zh.summary: 把个人进步和团队氛围一起呈现，让更多学员看到可抵达的成长路径。

en.title: University championship team moment
en.summary: A team photo from the national university badminton championship, connecting training, competition, and match review.

en.title: Trophies, medals, and certificates
en.summary: Results become part of a trackable growth record, making effort visible and the next goal clearer.

en.title: Junior medalists
en.summary: From daily practice to the podium, these moments show technique, confidence, and match experience growing together.

en.title: Junior first-place podium
en.summary: Podium results come from repeated correction, steady practice, and thoughtful match review.

en.title: Junior group awards
en.summary: Individual progress and team energy together show a growth path that more players can reach.
